heading: Availability of appropriations for attendance by military personnel at meetings and for printing survey reports
label: 540a Availability of appropriations for attendance by military personnel at meetings and for printing survey reports
text: Appropriations in this title or appropriations made in this title in subsequent Energy and Water Development Appropriations Acts shall on and after , be available for expenses of attendance by military personnel at meetings in the manner authorized by , uniforms, and allowances therefor, as authorized by law (2), and for printing, either during a recess or session of Congress, of survey reports authorized by law, and such survey reports as may be printed during a recess of Congress shall be printed, with illustrations, as documents of the next succeeding session of Congress.11section 4110 of title 55 U.S.C. 5901–590See References in Text note below.1October 2, 1992
notes: References in TextThis title, referred to in text, is title I of , , . For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 102–377106 Stat. 1315Oct. 2, 1992
